languages.original_text: "Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."

languages.text: "К сожалению, доктрина изоляции и несговорчивость некоторых коллег застопорили мои поиски, и я воспользовался возможностью примкнуть к вашей свите".
"Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."
languages.original_text: "К сожалению, доктрина изоляции и несговорчивость некоторых коллег застопорили мои поиски, и я воспользовался возможностью примкнуть к вашей свите".

traits.locale_text: "Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."
"Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."
"Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."

languages.text: «Por desgracia, la doctrina de aislamiento e intransigencia de varios colegas había dejado mi investigación en punto muerto, por lo que aproveché la oportunidad para unirme a su séquito».
languages.original_text: "Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."

traits.locale_text: «Por desgracia, la doctrina de aislamiento e intransigencia de varios colegas había dejado mi investigación en punto muerto, por lo que aproveché la oportunidad para unirme a su séquito».

languages.text: “唉，隔离主义以及几位同僚的顽固不化，让我的研究陷入了停滞。所以我才抓住机会，加入了您的随行队伍。”
languages.original_text: "Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."

traits.locale_text: “唉，隔离主义以及几位同僚的顽固不化，让我的研究陷入了停滞。所以我才抓住机会，加入了您的随行队伍。”

languages.text: « Malheureusement, la doctrine isolationniste et l'intransigeance de plusieurs de mes collègues avaient largement entravé mes recherches, c'est pourquoi j'ai accepté de me joindre à votre entourage. »
languages.original_text: "Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."

traits.locale_text: « Malheureusement, la doctrine isolationniste et l'intransigeance de plusieurs de mes collègues avaient largement entravé mes recherches, c'est pourquoi j'ai accepté de me joindre à votre entourage. »

languages.text: "Leider brachte die Doktrin der Isolation und die Uneinsichtigkeit einiger Kollegen meine Forschung zum Erliegen, also nutzte ich die Gelegenheit, mich Eurem Gefolge anzuschließen."
languages.original_text: "Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."

traits.locale_text: "Leider brachte die Doktrin der Isolation und die Uneinsichtigkeit einiger Kollegen meine Forschung zum Erliegen, also nutzte ich die Gelegenheit, mich Eurem Gefolge anzuschließen."

languages.text: 「残念なことに、孤立の教義と何人かの同僚の頑迷さによって、私の研究は行き詰まっていた。それゆえ、私は君の従者に加わる機会をつかんだのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."

traits.locale_text: 「残念なことに、孤立の教義と何人かの同僚の頑迷さによって、私の研究は行き詰まっていた。それゆえ、私は君の従者に加わる機会をつかんだのだ。」

languages.text: "Ne yazık ki tecrit öğretisi ve birkaç meslektaşımın uzlaşmazlığı, araştırmamı durma noktasına getirdi. Bu yüzden maiyetinize katılma fırsatını değerlendirmek istedim."
languages.original_text: "Alas, the doctrine of isolation and the intransigence of several colleagues had brought my research to a standstill, and so I seized the opportunity to join your retinue."

traits.locale_text: "Ne yazık ki tecrit öğretisi ve birkaç meslektaşımın uzlaşmazlığı, araştırmamı durma noktasına getirdi. Bu yüzden maiyetinize katılma fırsatını değerlendirmek istedim."
